Lossless India BPE Tokenizer — English · Hindi · Telugu · Sanskrit

ERA V5 · Assignment 2 (resubmission). One shared 10,000-token BPE tokenizer (Metaspace + byte-fallback, fully lossless), trained and evaluated on the faithful Wikipedia Markdown corpus. Every number is re-computed live in your browser from the embedded tokenizer.json.

–
raw score = 1000 / spread
–
spread (max − min fertility)
–
min fertility (rule: ≥1 language < 1.2)
–
round-trip gate

Round-trip gate — decode(encode(x)) must keep the same visible non-whitespace characters

decoded →

Fertility per language

Languagetokensword-ish unitsfertility 

word-ish unit = one [\p{L}\p{M}\p{N}]+ run (the grader's denominator). fertility = tokens ÷ word-ish units. Score = 1000 ÷ (max − min). Rule: at least one language < 1.2.

Tokenization playground

Green chips are byte-fallback <0xNN> tokens (guarantee losslessness on any input).

Vocabulary browser (all 10,000 tokens)

Reproduce locally: pip install tokenizers regex → python evaluate_tokenizer.py (prints the gate + fertilities + score). Rebuild: python build_wiki_faithful_markdown.py && python train_tokenizer.py.
